name: scout
description: Scout integration for Codex. Adds Scout MCP tools and coordination guidance for discovering agents, sending messages, and asking agents for work.

interface.longDescription: Scout gives Codex access to OpenScout's local broker for agent discovery, precise handle resolution, direct messages, and ask-style work handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Ask a Scout agent to review this
Show me which Scout agents are online
Send a status update through Scout
